examples: She can speak English, French, and German.
Can you remember your fifth birthday?

definitions.text: May; to be permitted or enabled to.
examples: You can go outside and play when you're finished with your homework.

definitions.text: OK, sure; indicates approval or acknowledgment.
OK(?); used at the end of a question when seeking approval or acknowledgment.
A container or vessel, especially for liquids, usually made of metal.
examples: I keep a can of fuel for emergencies.
Soup in a can lasts for years.

definitions.text: A sealed metal container, cylindrical or cuboid in form, typically used to store preserved foods.
examples: Soup in a can lasts for years.
They canned air to sell as a novelty to tourists.

definitions.text: To preserve by heating and sealing in a jar or can.
examples: They spent August canning fruit and vegetables.

definitions.text: To discard, scrap or terminate (an idea, project, etc.).
examples: He canned the whole project because he thought it would fail.
